+{

+    "title": "buildpacks: Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64",
+    "description": "Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64. Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current buildpacks setup",
+        "description": "Verify your buildpacks version and configuration:\n```bash\npack version\n```\nThis feature requires a working buildpacks installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review buildpacks configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:\nCurrent binary distribution for `pack` only supports `amd64` . Adding binaries for ARM will enable `pack` to be used on Raspberry Pi and similar hardware."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nAfter investigating, I put linux `arm64` and `arm7` on hold, due to requiring changes in the lifecycle. Mac M1, on the other hand, can successfully build applications, albeit slowly (due to the lifecycle not having a matching release). As such, this PR builds a Mac Arm64 binary and adds\n```yaml\npack build -B gcr.io/buildpacks/builder:v1 ${IMAGE}\nv1: Pulling from buildpacks/builder\nDigest: sha256:889d1cc172467dfb5560c69e5a24d8215804e0fb9ae36e2774f33bc2033ffb8c\nStatus: Image is up to date for gcr.io/buildpacks/builder:v1\nv1: Pulling from buildpacks/gcp/run\nDigest: sha256:35c7b9995b7b0ad398e504bc178e38b28626e1ce9052cfeabc8750fc313b4d36\nStatus: Image is up to date for gcr.io/buildpacks/gcp/run:v1\nstandard_init_linux.go:190: exec user process caused \"exec format error\"\nERROR: failed to build: executing lifecycle: failed with status code: 1\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n\nAfter investigating, I put linux `arm64` and `arm7` on hold, due to requiring changes in the lifecycle. Mac M1, on the other hand, can successfully build applications, albeit slowly (due to the lifecycle not having a matching release). As such, this PR builds a Mac Arm64 binary and adds it to our releases. Further, it adds it to our Homebrew tap.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "pack build -B gcr.io/buildpacks/builder:v1 ${IMAGE}\nv1: Pulling from buildpacks/builder\nDigest: sha256:889d1cc172467dfb5560c69e5a24d8215804e0fb9ae36e2774f33bc2033ffb8c\nStatus: Image is up to date for gcr.io/buildpacks/builder:v1\nv1: Pulling from buildpacks/gcp/run\nDigest: sha256:35c7b9995b7b0ad398e504bc178e38b28626e1ce9052cfeabc8750fc313b4d36\nStatus: Image is up to date for gcr.io/buildpacks/gcp/run:v1\nstandard_init_linux.go:190: exec user process caused \"exec format error\"\nERROR: failed to build: executing lifecycle: failed with status code: 1"
+      ]
+    }
